That is known as the clathrate gun hypothesis. For any unaware clathrates, also often called gas hydrates, are a type of mineral composed of an ice lattice and some trapped secondary compound. For example neon clathrate would be a structure composed of ice with neon sequestered within it. There are a lot of these clathrates in the earths permafrost and among the most common and most worrying for climate change is methane clathrate.
